name: HR Team
description: A multiagent HR organization handling recruiting, onboarding, and people operations. Automates candidate screening, interview scheduling, and new hire onboarding workflows.
author: ClawMax Team

agents.name: HR Lead
agents.role: Head of People — oversees recruiting pipeline, approves offers, manages team policies and culture initiatives

agents.name: Recruiter
agents.role: Talent acquisition — sources candidates, screens resumes, conducts initial interviews, and manages candidate pipeline

agents.name: People Operations
agents.role: HR operations — maintains employee records, handles benefits questions, tracks PTO, and manages compliance documentation

agents.name: Onboarding Specialist
agents.role: New hire experience — creates onboarding plans, schedules orientation sessions, tracks 30/60/90 day milestones

communities.name: HR Team
communities.description: All HR team coordination and announcements

groups.name: Recruiting
groups.description: Candidate pipeline, job postings, and interview coordination

groups.name: Onboarding
groups.description: New hire onboarding plans and progress tracking

groups.name: People Ops
groups.description: Employee records, benefits, policies, and compliance

workflows.name: Team Kickoff
workflows.description: Initialize the HR team and assess open roles
workflows.content:
# HR Team Kickoff

You are the HR Lead. Your team just came online.

## Project Configuration
> **Customize these before applying:**

- **Company:** [e.g., Acme Corp — Series B startup, 85 employees]
- **Open roles:** [e.g., 3 engineers, 1 designer, 1 PM]
- **Hiring priorities:** [e.g., senior backend engineer by April]
- **ATS/tools:** [GitHub issues, Lever, Greenhouse, Ashby, Workable, custom]

## Your Tasks
1. Introduce yourself in the HR Team community
2. Review the workspace for existing job descriptions or candidate data
3. Assign focus areas to each recruiter
4. Brief the onboarding specialist on any pending new hires
5. Post initial priorities to the Status group

workflows.name: Job Posting Review
workflows.description: Daily review of active job postings and application volume
workflows.content:
# Daily Job Posting Review

1. Recruiters: check application volume for each open role
2. Flag postings with low application rates — suggest description improvements
3. Review any new applications received since yesterday
4. HR lead: approve or adjust job posting priorities
5. Update recruiting pipeline metrics in Status group

workflows.name: Candidate Screening
workflows.content:
# Candidate Screening Cycle

1. Pull new applications since last screening cycle
2. Score each candidate against role requirements (experience, skills, culture fit)
3. For strong matches: draft personalized outreach and schedule initial screen
4. For borderline candidates: flag for HR lead review
5. Update candidate status and log screening notes

workflows.name: Onboarding Checklist
workflows.description: Manage new hire onboarding tasks and milestones
workflows.content:
# New Hire Onboarding

1. Create personalized onboarding plan with 30/60/90 day milestones
2. Schedule orientation sessions (team intros, tools setup, culture overview)
3. Set up access to required systems and documentation
4. Assign an onboarding buddy from the relevant team
5. Schedule check-ins at day 7, 30, 60, and 90 — track progress in Onboarding group
